title: Tokokimo Double Duvet Cover Set 4 Piece, Double Bedding Sets with Fitted Sheet, Soft Microfiber Double Duvet Set with Fitted Shee (1x Duvet Cover, 2x Pillowcases, 1x Fitted Sheet)
features: BEDDING SET WITH FITTED SHEET - 1x duvet cover 200x200cm + 2x matching envelope pillowcases + extra 1x fitted sheet 135x190 cm with 40 cm deep pocket, are included in tokokimo 4pcs double bedding sets
SOFT WARM TO TOUCH - 4pcs double duvet set is made of comfortable microfiber, lightweight and breathable fabric which helps u enjoy good sleep at nights and keeps decent warmth all day

ALL AROUND ELASTIC - The all-around elastic used in the fitted sheet makes it fit easily onto the mattress while giving a nice finish to the bed. Durable zip fastening instead of buttons which makes the life easier

EASY CARE - Machine wash in cold water, tumble dry low, do not bleach. Colors would not fade and keeps new for long time. Modern style grey double duvet set with fitted sheet and pillowcases for bed set, tokokimo bedding sets fits for bedroom, guestroom, dormitories during all seasons

HOME BEDDING CHOICE - Tokokimo duvet cover sets come with customized standard zipped packing bag, ship fast, and protect double bedding set far from dirty or wrinkles. They would enjoy the soft warm touch and enjoy comfortable sleeping all day, be delighted with Tokokimo double duvet set
TREAT FOR LOVED ONE - The Duvet Cover Set is Perfect Gift for all your loved ones on special occasions; surprise your friends & family
